TABLE-I CONTINUED: POLICY SAMPLES

SAMPLE: MASSACHUSETTS-ADAMS-SCHOLARSHIP (LABEL: MA SCHOLARSHIP) START=2005 PAPER-AGE=20 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED [COHODES-GOODMAN:2014; GOODMAN:2008]

SAMPLE: PELL-GRANTS-IN-OHIO (LABEL: OHIO PELL) START=2000 PAPER-AGE=19 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED [BETTINGER:2004]

SAMPLE: PELL-GRANTS-IN-TENNESSEE (LABEL: TN PELL) START=2008 PAPER-AGE=20 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED ∧ BENEFICIARIES [US-DEPT-ED-OFFICE-POSTSEC-ED:2010; CARRUTHERS-WELCH:2019]

SAMPLE: PELL-GRANTS-IN-TEXAS (LABEL: TEXAS PELL) START=2008 PAPER-AGE=20 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED ∧ BENEFICIARIES [DENNING:2019]

SAMPLE: SOCIAL-SECURITY-STUDENT-BENEFIT-PROGRAM (LABEL: SOC-SEC COLLEGE) START=1982 PAPER-AGE=20 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED [DYNARSKI:2003]

SAMPLE: COLLEGE-SPENDING-FROM-STATE-APPROPRIATIONS (LABEL: COLLEGE SPEND) START=2001 PAPER-AGE=20 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED [DEMING-WALTERS:2017]

SAMPLE: TENNESSEE-HOPE-SCHOLARSHIPS (LABEL: TN HOPE) START=2008 PAPER-AGE=20 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED [BRUCE-CARRUTHERS:2014]

SAMPLE: COLLEGE-TUITION-CUTS-FROM-STATE-APPROPRIATIONS (LABEL: COLLEGE TUITION) START=2001 PAPER-AGE=20 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED [DEMING-WALTERS:2017]

SAMPLE: WISCONSIN-SCHOLAR-GRANT–LOW-INCOME-STUDENTS (LABEL: WI SCHOLARSHIP) START=2009 PAPER-AGE=20 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED [GOLDRICK-RAB:2016]

SAMPLE: JOB CORPS (LABEL: JOB CORPS) START=1995 PAPER-AGE=19 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED ∧ BENEFICIARIES [SCHOCHET et al.:2006; SCHOCHET:2018]

SAMPLE: JTPA-ADULT (LABEL: JTPA ADULT) START=1988 PAPER-AGE=34 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED ∧ BENEFICIARIES [BLOOM et al.:1997]

SAMPLE: JTPA-YOUTH (LABEL: JTPA YOUTH) START=1988 PAPER-AGE=19 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED ∧ BENEFICIARIES [BLOOM et al.:1997]

SAMPLE: JOBSTART (LABEL: JOBSTART) START=1986 PAPER-AGE=19 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED ∧ BENEFICIARIES [CAVE et al.:1993]

SAMPLE: NSW–ADULT-WOMEN (LABEL: NSW WOMEN) START=1976 PAPER-AGE=34 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED ∧ BENEFICIARIES [HOLLISTER-KEMPER-MAYNARD:1984; COUCH:1992]

SAMPLE: NSW–EX-ADDICT (LABEL: NSW EX-ADDICT) START=1976 PAPER-AGE=33 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED ∧ BENEFICIARIES [HOLLISTER-KEMPER-MAYNARD:1984]

SAMPLE: NSW–EX-OFFENDER (LABEL: NSW EX-OFFENDER) START=1976 PAPER-AGE=33 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED ∧ BENEFICIARIES [HOLLISTER-KEMPER-MAYNARD:1984]

SAMPLE: NSW–YOUTH (LABEL: NSW YOUTH) START=1976 PAPER-AGE=18 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED ∧ BENEFICIARIES [HOLLISTER-KEMPER-MAYNARD:1984; COUCH:1992]

SAMPLE: WORK-ADVANCE (LABEL: WORK ADVANCE) START=2012 PAPER-AGE=34 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED ∧ BENEFICIARIES [SCHABERG:2017; HENDRA et al.:2016]

SAMPLE: YEAR-UP (LABEL: YEAR UP) START=2013 PAPER-AGE=21 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED ∧ BENEFICIARIES [FEIN-HAMADYK:2018]

PANEL-B: SOCIAL-INSURANCE

SAMPLE: DI-GENEROSITY (LABEL: DI GENEROSITY) START=2004 PAPER-AGE=50 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED ∧ BENEFICIARIES [GELBER-MOORE-STRAND:2017]

SAMPLE: DI-JUDGE-LENIENCY (LABEL: DI JUDGE) START=2005 PAPER-AGE=47 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED ∧ BENEFICIARIES [MAESTAS-MULLEN-STRAND:2013; GELBER-MOORE-STRAND:2017]

SAMPLE: DI-EXAMINER (LABEL: DI EXAMINER) START=1995 PAPER-AGE=48 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED ∧ BENEFICIARIES [GELBER-MOORE-STRAND:2017; FRENCH-SONG:2014]

SAMPLE: DI-VETERANS (LABEL: DI VETERANS) START=2001 PAPER-AGE=53 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED ∧ BENEFICIARIES [AUTOR et al.:2016]

SAMPLE: MASS-HEALTH-INSURANCE (LABEL: MASS HI) START=2011 PAPER-AGE=44 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED ∧ BENEFICIARIES [HENDREN:2017c; FINKELSTEIN-HENDREN-SHEPARD:2019]

SAMPLE: MASS-HI-200%FPL (LABEL: MASS HI (200%FPL)) START=2011 PAPER-AGE=44 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED ∧ BENEFICIARIES [HENDREN:2017c; FINKELSTEIN-HENDREN-SHEPARD:2019]

SAMPLE: MASS-HI-250%FPL (LABEL: MASS HI (250%FPL)) START=2011 PAPER-AGE=44 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED ∧ BENEFICIARIES [HENDREN:2017c; FINKELSTEIN-HENDREN-SHEPARD:2019]

SAMPLE: MEDICARE-INTRODUCTION (LABEL: MEDICARE) START=1965 PAPER-AGE=78 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED ∧ BENEFICIARIES [US-CENSUS:1966; FINKELSTEIN-MCKNIGHT:2008]

SAMPLE: OREGON-HEALTH-INSURANCE-EXPERIMENT (LABEL: OREGON) START=2008 PAPER-AGE=42 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED ∧ BENEFICIARIES [FINKELSTEIN et al.:2012; LUTTMER:2019]

SAMPLE: MEDIGAP-TAXATION (LABEL: MEDIGAP TAX) START=2002 PAPER-AGE=75 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED ∧ BENEFICIARIES [CABRAL-MAHONEY:2019]

SAMPLE: MEDICAID-EXPANSION-CHILDREN (LABEL: MC) START=1990 PAPER-AGE=11 PAPERS ∧ IMPLEMENTED ∧ BENEFICIARIES [LO-SASSO-SEAMSTER:2007; WHERRY-MEYER:2016; WHERRY et al.:2018]
